name: aicaddy-voice-agent
description: Run Course Guide API, token server, Vite, and LiveKit agent together

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n guide,api,vite,agent -c blue,green,cyan,magenta "npm run dev:guide" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:vite" "npm run dev:agent"
scripts.dev:guide: cd agent && uv run uvicorn guide_service_app:app --app-dir src --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8765
scripts.dev:agent: cd agent && uv run src/agent.py dev
